arts.sum: There was great news at Tuesday's Barça training session ahead of the cup game at Mestalla on Thursday at 9.30pm CET. Araujo, although he did not want to reveal his new release clause, insisted on his desire to continue as a Barça player and pointed out that "we all did a great job and now I feel valued, that's the important thing.

arts.ttl: Barcelona named amongst three giants following right-back
arts.sum: Barcelona are keen to give Hansi Flick more depth at the full-back positions next season, with the right-back spot in particular a priority for Sporting Director Deco. With several major contract renewals done, and the January transfer window shut, the Blaugrana are now looking at their options for the summer. The Blaugrana have been linked […] The post Barcelona named amongst three giants following right-back appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona make embarrassing mistake as Premier League transfer costs them millions
arts.sum: Manchester City's £50million deal to sign midfielder Nico Gonzalez from Porto has seen ex-club Barcelona receive a cut of the fee, but it's much less than what they initially negotiated for

arts.ttl: ‘No room for error’ - Araujo sends Barca title warning
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo has warned his team there’s “no room for error” in the title race after cutting the gap to Real Madrid. Barca have already lost five times this season in the Spanish top flight, and Araujo knows his team can’t afford any more slip-ups.

arts.ttl: Futuristic Nike Barcelona & Chelsea 25-26 Concept Kits Using Unreleased Nike Total 90 Template
arts.sum: In the summer of 2025, Nike will release a spectacular T90 football kit template.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi’s Barcelona locker is up for sale, and it’s not cheap
arts.sum: The locker used by Messi is available to bid on at auction and has already reached an eye-watering figure. At time of writing, the top bid for Lionel Messi’s Barcelona locker sits at $300,000, however there’s an additional 22% in bidder’s fee for the lucky winner to face.

arts.ttl: Barcelona eyeing summer deal for Crystal Palace star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are giving consideration to a summer swoop for a member of the defensive ranks at Crystal Palace. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing Antena 2, who…
